text.title: Role Cheatsheet Generator Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to generate a per-role cheatsheet end-to-end.

step.name: check-coverage
step.action: Verify role-tag coverage ≥80% AND ≥10 methodologies tagged for the role.
step.decision-gate: If coverage insufficient, STOP — generate role tags first.

step.name: filter-by-tier
step.action: Filter corpus to methodologies at or below org tier.

step.name: rank-and-cap
step.action: Sort by priority desc → role-tag match-count desc → slug alphabetical; cap at top 10.

step.name: merge-overrides
step.action: Insert override entries up to a 5-cap; record overrides_merged count.

step.name: emit-and-validate
step.action: Emit `cheatsheet-<role>.md` with `# generated-do-not-edit` header. Run `scripts/validate-role-cheatsheet-generator.py --file cheatsheet.json`.
